      Power Packages

      Our Power Packages are custom-built, step-by-step kits that let you choose high-performance parts with total confidence. Each part is guaranteed to fit and function seamlessly with your truck and other selected components — no compatibility worries, no wasted time.

AMDP

(93 products)
Transform your truck's performance with AMDP Custom Tuning! Get a smoother ride, improved fuel efficiency, and more power. Your truck will thank you.
AMDP Custom Tuning was born in Lacombe, AB, but has since relocated to West Kelowna, BC. Launched in 2015, their mission was simple: to create cutting-edge products for diesel enthusiasts. With a loyal customer base, they strive to make your diesel pickup truck not just suitable, but excel in every aspect of your needs, whether it's for commuting, hauling, or competing.
  • Optimize your truck's performance
  • Smoother ride
  • Better fuel economy
  • Increased power

Back to top

Who We Are

Dirty Diesel Customs is a full-service performance diesel shop based in West Kelowna, B.C. Canada. We do everything from Race Engines to OEM Maintenance.  

We pride ourselves on quality work, unmatched customer service, and a team that lives and breathes diesel performance.
